title: Malfind Schema
description: Schema for normalized Volatility malfind output. Each object represents a suspicious memory region found in a process.

start_vpn.description: Start of the virtual page number (hex address)

end_vpn.description: End of the virtual page number (hex address)

tag.description: Pool tag for the VAD entry

private_memory.description: Whether the region is private memory (not backed by a file)
